2026-06-02ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Social Security TribunalReappointment of Meena Harpreet Kaur Dhillon of Port Coquitlam, British Columbia, as a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective September 3, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal
precis: Reappointment of Meena Harpreet Kaur Dhillon of Port Coquitlam, British Columbia, as a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective September 3, 2026.
